data.title: Why Micron Could Rally All The Way Through Q4
data.description: After a near-perfect 2023 in terms of gains, this year has been a return to reality for shares of semiconductor tech giant Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MU).

data.title: Pentair Beats Q3 Estimates, Raises Profit Outlook As CEO Credits 'Strong Execution'
data.description: Pentair reported strong Q3 results, with net sales of $993M, adjusted EPS of $1.09, and raised full-year guidance. Stock trading higher.

data.title: Retail Inventory Pressures Hit Kimberly-Clark's Annual Outlook, Stock Slides
data.description: Kimberly-Clark's Q3 earnings beat expectations at $1.83, but revenue fell short at $4.95 billion, leading to a stock drop amid a weak FY24 outlook.

data.title: Nano Nuclear Stock Is Trading Lower Tuesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Nano Nuclear Energy Inc (NASDAQ:NNE) shares are trading lower Tuesday after the company announced an offering.

data.title: Using Retirement Funds For Home Repairs After A Disaster: What Retirees Should Know
